archetype: Precision Command Console (E1 Performance Pro / Swiss Hybrid)
concept: A mission-control console set against deep space — calm, precise, 'command center,' not gamer-neon. Refined dark, with restrained nebula accents and a faint starfield. Prioritize legibility and density for operators scanning data.

colors.tailwind_config_instructions: Map the exact CSS variables directly into tailwind.config.js under theme.colors. e.g., 'bg-deep': 'var(--bg-deep)'. Do not use default tailwind gray/slate scales for the UI.

rules.headings: Precise geometric/engineered look using IBM Plex Sans. Never use standard generic fonts like Inter or Roboto.
rules.data_labels: Use JetBrains Mono. Specifically for sol numbers, dates, scores, KPIs. Uppercase mono labels with letter-spacing (tracking-[0.2em]) for section headers.
rules.scale: Clear type scale with generous line-height.

backgrounds_and_surfaces.app_background: Set to var(--bg-deep). Implement layered radial gradients (cyan & violet glows at low opacity) using CSS background-image radial-gradient.
backgrounds_and_surfaces.starfield: A subtle, low-contrast starfield. Implement via a single SVG/Canvas or CSS particle effect fixed to the background. MUST remain quiet and never distracting.
backgrounds_and_surfaces.cards: Glassmorphism style: translucent var(--bg-panel) background + backdrop-blur-md + 1px solid var(--line) border. 12-16px border-radius.
backgrounds_and_surfaces.elevated_cards: Use var(--bg-elev) for tooltips, dropdowns, and modal surfaces. Add a soft glow on hover/focus using box-shadow with var(--accent-cyan) at 10% opacity.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mode B: 'Control Room' Grid. High density for operators scanning data. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 or 12-col dense layouts. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layout_and_spacing.navigation: Left sidebar OR sticky top nav. Must include Org Switcher, navigation links (Dashboard, Opportunities, Admin, Settings, User Menu), and a live UTC/local clock styled in mono font.
layout_and_spacing.tables: Sticky table headers. Zebra-free rows. Include hover highlight on rows (e.g., bg-white/5). Responsive: scroll horizontally on small screens.

components.buttons: Primary actions (Verify & Refresh, Pull from SAM) use var(--accent-cyan) backgrounds or outlines. Include progress states and toast notifications on success.
components.badges_pills: Semantic pill/badge components for status, set-aside, stage, bid call using var(--ok), var(--warn), var(--bad). Color MUST NEVER be the only signal: always pair with text/icon.
components.kpi_cards: Display large numerals in JetBrains Mono. Place inside glass cards.
components.charts: Recharts library. Use cyan, violet, magenta, teal, amber series. Transparent background for the chart container. Grid lines use var(--line). Tooltips use var(--bg-elev). Reserve magenta strictly for rare highlights.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI forms. Hairline borders (var(--line)). Visible focus rings (var(--accent-cyan)).

motion_and_interaction.page_load: One orchestrated page-load reveal. Staggered fade/slide using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interaction.background_motion: Gentle parallax or slow drift on the starfield.
motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: Hover micro-interactions on table rows, buttons, and cards (soft glow).
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: CRITICAL: No heavy continuous animation. Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query. Always provide visible focus rings and ARIA labels.

states.empty: Design bespoke empty states for tables and pipelines. Use faded mono text.
states.loading: Use skeleton loaders matching the glass card shapes and chart dimensions.
states.error: Clear error states with var(--bad) accents and retry actions.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the custom CSS variables to the Tailwind configuration.
Do not use Shadcn's default slate/zinc gray scales; override them with the provided --bg-*, --line, and --text-* variables.
Implement the starfield as a low-overhead CSS or SVG background, using the provided background_texture lightly overlaid if necessary, or just purely CSS.
All Recharts instances must have transparent backgrounds and grid strokes explicitly set to var(--line).
Use Phosphor Icons or Lucide-react for sharp, technical dashboard iconography.
Ensure the 'Verify & Refresh with AI' and 'Pull from SAM/Grants' buttons have explicit loading states and trigger Sonner toasts upon completion.
Scorecard component must visually separate 'Proposal Strength' and 'Capture Probability' (e.g., multi-axis radar chart). Never combine into a single win-rate.
In the Compliance matrix, clearly implement the 'CMMC no-bid gate' UI, indicating a hard stop if criteria aren't met.
